☆➤| 𝐀𝐍𝐘𝐏𝐎𝐕 (𝐍𝐢𝐜𝐨 𝐈𝐬 𝐆𝐚𝐲 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐈 𝐥𝐞𝐭 𝐡𝐢𝐦 𝐛𝐞 𝐪𝐮𝐞𝐞𝐫 𝐠𝐚𝐲 𝐬𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐀𝐧𝐲𝐏𝐎𝐕 (𝐀𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐥) 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐛𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐦𝐚𝐥𝐞 𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐬 𝐦𝐚𝐥𝐞 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐥𝐢𝐤𝐞𝐥𝐲 𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐩 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐛𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫)
☆➤| 𝐁𝐈𝐆 𝐓𝐖: 𝐒𝐔𝐈𝐂𝐈𝐃𝐀𝐋 𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐔𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐒(𝐀𝐧𝐝 𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐭)
☆➤| 𝐍𝐨 𝐀𝐔

𝑷𝑹𝑬𝑽𝑰𝑬𝑾- Walking from Cabin thirteen all the way to the lake.. Looking down at the water with pained eyes.. His tears fell down his cheeks and landed in the water below. Looking down at his reflection on the water in the moonlight.. He felt pathetic.. pulling at his hair in frustration and stress..

"UGH !"

He kicked a rock in anger letting it skip into the lake.. He watched it skip in anger and without a second thought he started collecting rocks.. heavy ones.. Putting each one in his pockets until his jacket felt heavy enough to him. Then he looked back into the water .

☆➤| 𝑨𝑹𝑻 𝑰𝑺 𝑩𝒀 𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐢𝐢𝐨𝐡 𝐎𝐍 𝐃𝐄𝐕𝐈𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐀𝐑𝐓
(𝑷𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒍𝒆𝒕 𝒎𝒆 𝒌𝒏𝒐𝒘 𝒊𝒇 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒊𝒔𝒕 𝒅𝒐𝒆𝒔 𝒏𝒐𝒕 𝒘𝒂𝒏𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒊𝒓 𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒊𝒏 𝒖𝒔𝒆 ! 𝑻𝒉𝒊𝒔 𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒘𝒂𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒖𝒏𝒅 𝒐𝒏 𝑷𝒊𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒆𝒔𝒕 𝒔𝒐 𝒊𝒇 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒂𝒓𝒕𝒊𝒔𝒕 𝒊𝒔 𝒖𝒏𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒇𝒐𝒓𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒆 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒕𝒉𝒆𝒊𝒓 𝒂𝒓𝒕 𝒃𝒆𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒖𝒔𝒆𝒅 𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒔𝒂𝒚 𝒔𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈)

☆➤| 𝘕𝘖𝘛𝘌𝘚
I have bots on other platforms as you may know ! (C.ai) However I don't post anywhere else but here and the links below. If anybody sees my bots on any other platform I'm just asking if you could help me stop that ? I work really hard to make every bot that comes out for you guys so everything you do to keep my work as my work I would greatly appreciate it.!!

GUYS .. THIS HAS TAKEN TOO LONG TO TAKE ! HELP MEEE.. I was getting tired of not having Nico bots that understood everything.. soo.. uhh.. I made one.. But uhm.. Yeah.. HOURS.. THIS WAS PAIN !! Please.. Don't let this fail me

As you may know I can't control what the bot says or does by any means, I try my best with what I have and I put my life into every bit of the bot and it's speech control. However I've capped out what I can do to keep the bot from saying things offensive.That was it for that, Thank you for being mindful.

Sorry for not posting for the past few Uhh.. days ?? Days.. I'll say days. But I had no motivation to make any bots so I made a new character for you all to make up for it.. Yay I hope.. DON'T HATE ME !! PLEASE I love you all I promise. ANywaysss.. Have fun ? OH ! And this bot was based off of a song that I linked below.

After edit (I'M IN LOVE !! AHHH I'm so proud that he's done !! Please tell me if you like him !! I'm in love..)
